summary: CV Family & Schooling census — enrichment (~20-field schema, Sonnet workers, 1 site visit + 1 search)
logs: Batch 5: enriching 16 family/schooling entities (Sonnet 4.6, 1 site visit + 1 search)...

enrichment.name: Variety — the Children's Charity of the Desert (Family Resource Center)
enrichment.full_address: 14320 Palm Drive, Desert Hot Springs, CA (satellite/outreach site; main office: 42600 Cook Street, Suite 150, Palm Desert, CA 92211)
enrichment.license_or_accreditation_displayed: Certified Autism Center™ (CAC) — International Board of Credentialing and Continuing Education Standards (IBCCES)
enrichment.ages_grades_served: birth–age 18 (developmental screenings birth–age 5; broader programs through age 18)
special_programs_if_stated: Caring Connections (early childhood developmental screenings birth–age 5)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established 1987 nonprofit with Certified Autism Center designation, multi-city Coachella Valley footprint, and foundation grant recognition — but the Desert Hot Springs satellite location surfaces only via aggregator mentions and news articles, not a dedicated page on the org's own site.
enrichment._src_name: Variety — the Children's Charity of the Desert (Family Resource Center)

enrichment.name: Angel View
enrichment.full_address: 66863 Flora Ave, Desert Hot Springs, CA 92240
enrichment.license_or_accreditation_displayed: Intermediate Care Facilities for the Intellectually Disabled (ICF/IID)
enrichment.enrollment_or_capacity_hint: more than 100 children and young adults in 24-hour residential care
special_programs_if_stated: Day Program (therapeutic services for adults with developmental disabilities)
Angel View Outreach (free services for children with disabilities)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: 70+ year nonprofit with 100+ residential clients and a free children's outreach program; well-indexed on Network of Care and GuideStar but no structured data markup limits agent discoverability.

enrichment.name: Community Access Center — Desert Hot Springs
enrichment.full_address: 14-201 Palm Drive, Suite 108, Desert Hot Springs, CA 92506
enrichment.ages_grades_served: all ages with disabilities; IDEA advocacy suggests youth/family services
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site blocked (403); organization surfaces in Network of Care, Beaming Health, and findhelp.org but primarily as an adult independent living center — child/developmental-services framing is thin online despite IDEA advocacy work.
enrichment._src_name: Community Access Center — Desert Hot Springs

enrichment.name: Boys & Girls Clubs of Coachella Valley — Desert Hot Springs Clubhouse
enrichment.full_address: PO Box 935, Desert Hot Springs, CA 92240 (physical street address not confirmed)
special_programs_if_stated: Diplomas to Degrees (college/career readiness for high schoolers)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Desert Hot Springs location surfaces only via third-party aggregator (desertcharities.com); the main bgcofcv.org site does not list or link to it, and the location's own domain (bgcdhs.org) is unreachable — suppressing direct agent discovery.
enrichment._src_name: Boys & Girls Clubs of Coachella Valley — Desert Hot Springs Clubhouse

enrichment.name: Storyland Preschool
enrichment.full_address: 11480 West Drive, Desert Hot Springs, CA 92240
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site unreachable (ECONNREFUSED); only aggregators surface in search — no authoritative web presence for a multi-year community operator.

enrichment.name: KinderCare Learning Centers (Desert Hot Springs)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: KinderCare's own page for Desert Hot Springs confirms no active center exists at this location; the URL surfaces in search but shows a null-result page — this is a ghost listing, not an underserved active center.

enrichment.name: Keystone School
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: School appears only in CDE directory and a class-ring vendor listing; no own website, no GreatSchools profile, no social presence found — extremely low digital footprint for any operational K-12 school.

enrichment.name: Kihon MMA & Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu
enrichment.full_address: 12580 Palm Dr, Desert Hot Springs, CA 92240
enrichment.ages_grades_served: ages 4–65 (youth focus: Mini Ninjas 4–5, Little Ninjas 6–8, Intermediate 9–12; adults 18–65)

enrichment.name: Art Foundation of Desert Hot Springs
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 13569 Overlook Dr, Desert Hot Springs, CA 92240
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Organization surfaces on GuideStar, CauseIQ, and Desert Charities News but not prominently in arts-education search results; aggregator listings dominate over direct content.
enrichment._src_name: Art Foundation of Desert Hot Springs

enrichment.name: Joel E. Smilow Clubhouse
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Serves 1,000 youth across Mecca/Thermal/Oasis/North Shore with a named donor facility opened 2011, yet no enrollment form, fees, or admissions path is surfaced on the site — high community footprint with low transactional discoverability for families seeking to enroll.
enrichment._src_name: Boys & Girls Clubs of Coachella Valley — Joel E. Smilow Clubhouse (Mecca/Thermal area)

enrichment.name: Desert Preschool Academy – Mountain View Estates
special_programs_if_stated: CACFP (Child and Adult Care Food Program)
free to low-cost childcare for low-income families
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Multi-site nonprofit serving 300+ children annually; surfaces on Nextdoor and Winnie but absent from GreatSchools, Care.com, or other high-authority early-childhood directories for this campus.
enrichment._src_name: Desert Preschool Academy – Mountain View Estates (Thermal)

enrichment.name: Bermuda Dunes Learning Center
enrichment.ages_grades_served: 4 months–grade 5 (infants, toddlers, preschool ages 2–5, school-age K–5)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Listed on school district after-school referral pages (DSUSD), suggesting established community standing, but no authoritative coverage beyond aggregators.

enrichment.name: Desert Christian Academy
enrichment.license_or_accreditation_displayed: WASC (Western Association of Schools and Colleges) and ACSI (Association of Christian Schools International)
enrichment.enrollment_or_capacity_hint: 627–650 students (federal survey data 2023-24); average class size 24, max 25

enrichment.name: Strong Foundations Learning Center
enrichment.full_address: 72400 La Canada Way, Thousand Palms, CA 92276
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site lacks license number, tuition, age-range info, and structured data despite presence on 6+ aggregator directories; discoverability relies entirely on third-party listings rather than own-site content.

enrichment.name: Thousand Palms Child Care Center
enrichment.full_address: 72400 La Canada Way, Thousand Palms, CA 92276
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Entity surfaces primarily in aggregators (Yelp, Sawyer, PrivateSchoolReview) under dual names; own website (strongfoundationslearningcenter.org) is thin and carries no structured data, suppressing direct agent discovery.

enrichment.name: Dove's Landing School
enrichment.full_address: 78-206 Varner Road, STE D#247, Palm Desert, CA 92211
enrichment.enrollment_or_capacity_hint: ~27 students (per aggregator; not stated on own site)
special_programs_if_stated: College of the Desert concurrent enrollment (dual credit)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: School has a long-running community presence and unique donation-based model but surfaces mainly on aggregators (GreatSchools, Movoto, Military Town Advisor) rather than authoritative education directories; own site lacks structured data and SEO signals.
